[49m  [1mWould you like to make the following edits?[0m

  Reason: [3mcommand failed; retry without sandbox?[0m


[1m[38;5;6m› 1. Yes, proceed (y)[0m
  2. Yes, and don't ask again for these files ([2ma[0m)
  3. No, and tell Codex what to do differently ([2mesc[0m)

  [2mPress enter to confirm or esc to cancel
